projectDescription: PeerNotes is a shared idea and thinking workspace for teams — capture notes with a web clipper or dictation, develop them together with real-time collaboration and AI, and share finished thinking clearly.
keyFeatures: Web clipper — save any article, page, or quote into your workspace
Dictate a note — speak your thinking out loud and PeerNotes captures it
Real-time collaboration — teammates develop ideas right alongside you
Shared workspace — one organized home for your team's notes and thinking
AI assistant — questions and sharpens ideas instead of writing them for you
Listen to your workspace — catch up on notes by ear
Chrome extension (pre-release) — install manually until Chrome Web Store listing goes live
